properties.text: auctionCallback must reject calls where msg.sender is not the stored auction contract.
properties.assertion: forall call auctionCallback(from, amount, assetOut, data): msg.sender == s_auction

properties.text: auctionCallback must reject calls where from parameter is not address(this).
properties.assertion: forall call auctionCallback(from, ...): from == address(this)

properties.text: _multiCall in auctionCallback has no reentrancy guard; re-entrant calls may cause inconsistent state.
properties.assertion: forall _multiCall(calls): no external call target can re-enter AuctionBidder state-changing functions

properties.text: Token approvals set during _multiCall callback must not persist for arbitrary spenders beyond intended scope.
properties.assertion: forall _multiCall(calls): post(_multiCall) => allowance(this, spender) == 0 for all spender != s_auction

properties.text: bid() forceApprove amount must equal getAssetOutAmount(assetIn, amount, block.timestamp) exactly.
properties.assertion: bid(assetIn, amount, solution) where !solution => forceApprove(auction, getAssetOutAmount(assetIn, amount, block.timestamp))

properties.text: After bid(), all acquired assetOut balance must be forwarded to receiver if receiver != address(0).
properties.assertion: post(bid): receiver != 0 => IERC20(assetOut).balanceOf(this) == 0 (transferred to receiver)

properties.text: When receiver is address(0), leftover assetOut tokens accumulate in contract with no automated retrieval.
properties.assertion: receiver == 0 AND assetOutBalance > 0 => tokens locked until admin withdraw()

properties.text: bid() must enforce whenNotPaused and onlyRole(AUCTION_BIDDER_ROLE) before any state changes.
properties.assertion: forall bid(assetIn, amount, solution): !paused AND hasRole(AUCTION_BIDDER_ROLE, msg.sender)

properties.text: _call performs arbitrary external call with no gas limit; a malicious target can consume all remaining gas.
properties.assertion: forall _call(target, data): gasLeft after call >= MIN_GAS_THRESHOLD for remaining execution

properties.text: _multiCall must revert on empty calls array to prevent no-op callback execution.
properties.assertion: forall _multiCall(calls): calls.length == 0 => revert EmptyList()

properties.text: _call must bubble up revert reason from failed external call or emit LowLevelCallFailed.
properties.assertion: forall _call(target, data): !success AND response.length > 0 => revert(response); !success AND response.length == 0 => revert LowLevelCallFailed()

properties.text: _setAuction must reject zero address before interface check.
properties.assertion: forall _setAuction(auction): auction == address(0) => revert InvalidZeroAddress()

properties.text: _setAuction must verify target implements IBaseAuction via ERC-165 supportsInterface.
properties.assertion: forall _setAuction(auction): !auction.supportsInterface(IBaseAuction.interfaceId) => revert InvalidAuctionContract(auction)

properties.text: _setAuction must reject setting the same auction address (no-op prevention).
properties.assertion: forall _setAuction(auction): address(s_auction) == auction => revert ValueNotUpdated()

properties.text: _setReceiver must reject setting the same receiver address.
properties.assertion: forall _setReceiver(receiver): receiver == s_receiver => revert ValueNotUpdated()

properties.text: withdraw() must only be callable by DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE holder.
properties.assertion: forall withdraw(to, assetAmounts): hasRole(DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE, msg.sender)

properties.text: withdraw() must reject address(0) as destination to prevent token burning.
properties.assertion: forall withdraw(to, assetAmounts): to == address(0) => revert InvalidZeroAddress()

properties.text: After _setAuction, s_auction must equal the new auction address and AuctionContractSet event emitted.
properties.assertion: post(_setAuction(auction)): s_auction == IBaseAuction(auction) AND emit AuctionContractSet(auction)

properties.text: Only the stored auction contract (s_auction) can trigger auctionCallback execution.
properties.assertion: trust_boundary: auctionCallback caller == s_auction AND origin == AuctionBidder

properties.text: AUCTION_BIDDER_ROLE holders control solution data that determines _multiCall targets in callback.
properties.assertion: trust: AUCTION_BIDDER_ROLE holders provide safe solution data; malicious solution => arbitrary calls

properties.text: _multiCall returnData indices must map 1-to-1 with input calls array indices.
properties.assertion: forall _multiCall(calls): len(returnData) == len(calls) AND returnData[i] == _call(calls[i])

properties.text: auctionCallback forceApprove after _multiCall must set exact amountOut approval for auction only.
properties.assertion: post(auctionCallback): allowance(this, s_auction) == amountOut

properties.text: supportsInterface must return true for IAuctionCallback.interfaceId.
properties.assertion: supportsInterface(IAuctionCallback.interfaceId) == true

properties.text: Constructor must enforce auction is set via _setAuction before completion; receiver is optionally set.
properties.assertion: post(constructor): s_auction != address(0) AND (receiver == 0 OR s_receiver == receiver)

properties.text: bid() with empty solution must pre-approve exact getAssetOutAmount; non-empty solution skips pre-approval.
properties.assertion: bid(assetIn, amount, solution): solution.length == 0 => forceApprove(auction, getAssetOutAmount(...))
